## edu-cli user create

Create a new user (default password: 123456)

```
edu-cli user create [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --email string      Email address
  -h, --help              help for create
      --mobile string     Mobile number
      --realname string   Real name
      --username string   Username (required)
```
